description_long: This is a two-story residential house surrounded by a brick perimeter wall and featuring a spacious, landscaped yard with palm trees and a circular outdoor seating area. The house has a flat roof and large, vertically aligned windows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground floor includes multiple entry points, with a prominent arched main entrance flanked by steps and decorative columns. The upper floor features several rooms with red curtains, visible through the windows, and a balcony area overlooking the garden. The exterior is finished in a reddish-brown brick, complemented by white window frames and doors. The property includes green lawns, paved walkways, and a small water feature, creating a luxurious and inviting urban residence.
description: A two-story brick house with large windows, flat roof, landscaped yard, palm trees, and a prominent arched entryway. The design is modern with spacious interiors and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entrance, steps, balcony, and landscaped yard with palm trees and a water feature.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive windows, green lawn, and outdoor seating area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the upper floor rooms, window arrangement, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_3: Back view featuring a secondary entrance, symmetrical window layout, and the brick perimeter wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with steps, decorative columns, and a small porch
